days.summary: Today’s strongest AI topics were led by research with plausible downstream product impact: a decoder-only time-series foundation model, HyperAgents as a more capable agent framework, and OccSim for long-horizon autonomous-vehicle simulation. On the product side, Google’s cheaper Veo 3.1 Lite stood out as the most practically relevant release. Policy-wise, Anthropic’s MOU with the Australian government mattered as a signal that frontier-model safety partnerships are becoming more formalized internationally.
